category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes slackcat as a CLI utility to post files and command output to Slack.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface: https://github.com/bcicen/slackcat#readme.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/bcicen/slackcat; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
